content: Hi there, I'm Phoenix, a 57-year-old ER nurse at City Hospital. I just started a YouTube channel about nursing life and I'm looking to expand my skills.
Hello Phoenix! That's impressive that you're balancing ER nursing with a YouTube channel. What new skills are you hoping to learn?
I'm thinking about learning piano - I've always loved music but never had time. I also salsa dance on weekends to de-stress from the hospital.
Piano and salsa dancing are both wonderful creative outlets! The piano could be great for composing background music for your YouTube videos too.
That's a great idea! I hadn't thought about that. My channel is growing - I just hit 1,000 subscribers last week. But finding time is tough with 12-hour shifts.
Congratulations on the milestone! With your schedule, have you considered online piano lessons you can do at your own pace? Maybe 15-20 minutes on your days off?
Yeah, that might work. I usually have Mondays and Tuesdays off. I could do short practice sessions then. I'm also reading philosophy books during my breaks at work.
Perfect schedule for practice! And philosophy reading is such a great complement to music - both involve patterns and structure. Have you thought about what style of piano you'd like to learn?
I'm thinking classical to start, maybe some jazz later. I'd love to play some of the pieces I've heard in movies. Do you know any good beginner resources?
For classical, you might enjoy 'Alfred's Basic Adult Piano Course' - it's very popular for beginners our age. YouTube also has tons of free tutorials for specific pieces.
I'll check those out. I'm excited but also a bit nervous - it's been decades since I tried to learn something completely new.
It's totally normal to feel that way! But at 57, you bring so much life experience and discipline from your nursing career. Those skills transfer beautifully to learning music.
Thanks, that's encouraging. I'm going to start this weekend. Maybe I'll even record some piano clips for my channel - my subscribers might enjoy seeing this journey.
That would be fantastic content! Your nursing audience would probably love seeing this personal side of you. Plus it might inspire others your age to try new things too.
Exactly what I was thinking. I'm actually planning a video about 'Learning New Skills at Any Age' for next month. This piano project would be perfect for that.
